decisions.rationale: Selected 5 mechanisms (complexity 11/14) with a complete feedback loop: income drives deck building drives hand quality drives set completion drives tableau growth drives more income. Hand management + deck building anchors honored. Set collection maps naturally to evolution requirements. Tableau building represents the persistent nursery. Income creates engine-building arc.

Warm pastoral theme with Blossom Grove Nursery setting. All 5 mechanisms mapped to thematic equivalents (Daily Schedule, Supply Stockroom, Growth Chart, Nursery Wing, Morning Provisions). 17-entry terminology glossary eliminates generic terms. Three-act narrative arc (First Light → Growing Pains → Grand Blossom) provides emotional progression. Evolution Glow as signature moment.

159 pieces is reasonable for medium-weight card game. Double-sided baby Pokemon create satisfying flip moment. 16 Pokemon with balanced care type distribution. Tiered market cards provide meaningful purchase decisions. No Medicine in starting deck forces early market engagement. Hybrid cards add flexibility. Solid player count scaling.

Complete unambiguous rulebook covering all components, all actions, all scoring, and 12 edge cases. 5-phase turn structure with clear boundaries. Thematic terminology used consistently. Setup manifest enables reconstruction of initial game state. Self-validation passed all 11 checks.

Simulation FAIL: P1 won all 3 games at 2P. Single Meadow slot creates structural first-player advantage. 6 Gentle Touch wilds trivialize the care-type matching core puzzle. Togetic snowball creates runaway leader effect. Fixes needed before release.

Critique iteration 2 passed exit criteria: Balance 6.8/10 (CONDITIONAL_PASS, 0 HIGH issues), Fun 7.0/10 (SOLID). All 4 original HIGH issues resolved: Meadow expanded, Gentle Touch reduced, Togetic capped, token economy improved. Remaining MEDIUM concerns are parameter tweaks (Spring Cleaning cost, Greenhouse ROI, Healing Ward overlap) for future iteration.

Care cards redesigned as dual-use: tuck for icons OR spend as currency (Care Value). Eliminates 40 Care Tokens (150 pieces, down from 190). Income replaced by draw engine (+1 card/evolved Pokémon). Purchasing power bonuses (Berry Garden, Chansey, Roselia, Blossom Greenhouse) replace token-based bonuses where draw would be overpowered. Spring Cleaning now costs 1 card instead of 2 tokens. Scoring replaces leftover-token VP with Nurture Mastery Bonus. Addresses known issues: generous economy, first-player advantage, Gentle Touch dominance, weak Spring Cleaning, Blossom Greenhouse ROI.
